cwes.name: Detection of Error Condition Without Action
cwes.requirement: All detected error conditions MUST trigger handling logic

cwes.name: NULL Pointer Dereference
cwes.requirement: Nullable references MUST be checked before dereferencing

cwes.name: Improper Handling of Exceptional Conditions
cwes.requirement: Exceptional conditions MUST be caught and handled appropriately

cwes.name: Missing Release of Resource after Effective Lifetime
cwes.requirement: Resources MUST be released in finally/defer blocks

cwes.name: Insufficient Technical Documentation
cwes.requirement: Error handling behaviour MUST be documented for public APIs

cwes.name: Unchecked Return Value
cwes.requirement: Return values from fallible operations MUST be checked

cwes.name: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release
cwes.requirement: Resources MUST be shut down in the correct order during cleanup

cwes.name: Incomplete Cleanup
cwes.requirement: Temporary resources MUST be cleaned up on all exit paths

cwes.name: Use of Obsolete Function
cwes.requirement: Deprecated functions MUST be replaced with supported alternatives

cwes.name: Uncontrolled Recursion
cwes.requirement: Recursive functions MUST have verifiable termination conditions

cwes.name: Declaration of Catch for Generic Exception
cwes.requirement: Catch blocks MUST target specific exception types, not generic Exception

cwes.name: Declaration of Throws for Generic Exception
cwes.requirement: Throw declarations MUST specify concrete exception types

cwes.name: Insufficient Control Flow Management
cwes.requirement: Control flow MUST be structured and predictable; no unreachable statements

cwes.name: Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions
cwes.requirement: Boundary and edge-case conditions MUST be checked explicitly

cwes.name: Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition
cwes.requirement: All loops MUST have reachable termination conditions
